indexes.expression: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_audit_entry_deleted_at" ON "trading_card_audit_entry" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_audit_entity" ON "trading_card_audit_entry" ("entity_type", "entity_id") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_set_deleted_at" ON "trading_card_set" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_set_identity" ON "trading_card_set" ("game", "language", "provider_set_code") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_provider_set_mapping_deleted_at" ON "trading_card_provider_set_mapping" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_provider_set_mapping_identity" ON "trading_card_provider_set_mapping" ("provider", "game", "language", "provider_set_code") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

checks.name: CK_provider_set_mapping_series_pair
checks.expression: (tcgdex_series_id is null and tcgdex_series_name is null) or (tcgdex_series_id is not null and tcgdex_series_name is not null)
checks.definition: check (((tcgdex_series_id is null and tcgdex_series_name is null) or (tcgdex_series_id is not null and tcgdex_series_name is not null)))

indexes.expression: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_rarity_mapping_deleted_at" ON "trading_card_rarity_mapping" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_rarity_mapping_global" ON "trading_card_rarity_mapping" ("provider", "comparison_value") WHERE language IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_rarity_mapping_language" ON "trading_card_rarity_mapping" ("provider", "language", "comparison_value") WHERE language IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_tcgdex_lookup_candidate_deleted_at" ON "trading_card_tcgdex_lookup_candidate" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_tcgdex_lookup_candidate_identity" ON "trading_card_tcgdex_lookup_candidate" ("provider", "language", "tcgdex_set_id", "card_number") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

checks.name: CK_tcgdex_lookup_candidate_review_status_pair
checks.expression: (match_outcome = 'MATCHED' and review_status is not null and enrichment is not null and candidate_options is null) or (match_outcome = 'AMBIGUOUS' and review_status is not null and enrichment is null and candidate_options is not null) or (match_outcome not in ('MATCHED', 'AMBIGUOUS') and review_status is null and enrichment is null and candidate_options is null)
checks.definition: check (((match_outcome = 'MATCHED' and review_status is not null and enrichment is not null and candidate_options is null) or (match_outcome = 'AMBIGUOUS' and review_status is not null and enrichment is null and candidate_options is not null) or (match_outcome not in ('MATCHED', 'AMBIGUOUS') and review_status is null and enrichment is null and candidate_options is null)))

indexes.expression: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_card_set_id" ON "trading_card" ("card_set_id") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_deleted_at" ON "trading_card" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_identity" ON "trading_card" ("card_set_id", "card_number_normalised") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

checks.name: CK_trading_card_rarity_mapping_pair
checks.expression: (rarity is null and rarity_icon_key is null) or (rarity is not null and rarity_icon_key is not null)
checks.definition: check (((rarity is null and rarity_icon_key is null) or (rarity is not null and rarity_icon_key is not null)))

checks.name: CK_trading_card_rarity_raw_pair
checks.expression: (rarity_raw is null and rarity_comparison is null) or (rarity_raw is not null and rarity_comparison is not null)
checks.definition: check (((rarity_raw is null and rarity_comparison is null) or (rarity_raw is not null and rarity_comparison is not null)))

indexes.expression: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_tcgdex_enrichment_proposal_trading_card_id" ON "trading_card_tcgdex_enrichment_proposal" ("trading_card_id") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_tcgdex_enrichment_proposal_deleted_at" ON "trading_card_tcgdex_enrichment_proposal" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_tcgdex_proposal_card_provider" ON "trading_card_tcgdex_enrichment_proposal" ("trading_card_id", "provider") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_tcgdex_proposal_snapshot" ON "trading_card_tcgdex_enrichment_proposal" ("trading_card_id", "provider", "snapshot_fingerprint") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_tcgdex_enrichment_attempt_trading_card_id" ON "trading_card_tcgdex_enrichment_attempt" ("trading_card_id") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_tcgdex_enrichment_attempt_deleted_at" ON "trading_card_tcgdex_enrichment_attempt" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_tcgdex_attempt_card_provider" ON "trading_card_tcgdex_enrichment_attempt" ("trading_card_id", "provider") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_tcgdex_attempt_diagnostic" ON "trading_card_tcgdex_enrichment_attempt" ("trading_card_id", "provider", "diagnostic_fingerprint") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_variant_trading_card_id" ON "trading_card_variant" ("trading_card_id") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_variant_deleted_at" ON "trading_card_variant" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_variant_identity" ON "trading_card_variant" ("trading_card_id", "condition", "finish", "special_treatment") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_variant_sku" ON "trading_card_variant" ("sku") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

checks.name: CK_trading_card_variant_price_lock_consistency
checks.expression: (price_locked and price_locked_at is not null and price_locked_actor is not null) or (not price_locked and price_locked_at is null and price_locked_actor is null and price_lock_reason is null)
checks.definition: check (((price_locked and price_locked_at is not null and price_locked_actor is not null) or (not price_locked and price_locked_at is null and price_locked_actor is null and price_lock_reason is null)))

indexes.expression: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_external_reference_trading_card_id" ON "trading_card_external_reference" ("trading_card_id") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_external_reference_card_set_id" ON "trading_card_external_reference" ("card_set_id") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_external_reference_trading_card_variant_id" ON "trading_card_external_reference" ("trading_card_variant_id") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_external_reference_deleted_at" ON "trading_card_external_reference" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_external_reference_provider_identifier" ON "trading_card_external_reference" ("provider", "provider_identifier") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_image_trading_card_variant_id" ON "trading_card_image" ("trading_card_variant_id") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_image_deleted_at" ON "trading_card_image" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_image_variant_id" ON "trading_card_image" ("trading_card_variant_id") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_image_staging_key" ON "trading_card_image" ("staging_object_key") WHERE staging_object_key is not null and deleted_at is null
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_image_final_key" ON "trading_card_image" ("final_object_key") WHERE final_object_key is not null and deleted_at is null
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_image_sha256" ON "trading_card_image" ("sha256_hash") WHERE sha256_hash is not null and deleted_at is null
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_image_ready_sort_order" ON "trading_card_image" ("trading_card_variant_id", "sort_order") WHERE status = 'READY' and deleted_at is null

checks.name: CK_trading_card_image_dimensions_positive
checks.expression: (width is null or width > 0) and (height is null or height > 0)
checks.definition: check (((width is null or width > 0) and (height is null or height > 0)))

checks.name: CK_trading_card_image_focal_bounds
checks.expression: focal_x between 0 and 1 and focal_y between 0 and 1
checks.definition: check ((focal_x between 0 and 1 and focal_y between 0 and 1))

checks.name: CK_trading_card_image_archived_consistency
checks.expression: (status = 'ARCHIVED' and archived_at is not null and archived_by is not null) or (status <> 'ARCHIVED' and archived_at is null and archived_by is null)
checks.definition: check (((status = 'ARCHIVED' and archived_at is not null and archived_by is not null) or (status <> 'ARCHIVED' and archived_at is null and archived_by is null)))

checks.name: CK_trading_card_image_lifecycle_keys
checks.expression:
case status
           when 'PENDING' then
             staging_object_key is not null and final_object_key is null and
             confirmed_mime_type is null and confirmed_byte_size is null and
             width is null and height is null and sha256_hash is null
           when 'READY' then
             staging_object_key is null and final_object_key is not null and
             confirmed_mime_type is not null and confirmed_byte_size is not null and
             width is not null and height is not null and sha256_hash is not null
           when 'ARCHIVED' then
             staging_object_key is null and final_object_key is not null and
             confirmed_mime_type is not null and confirmed_byte_size is not null and
             width is not null and height is not null and sha256_hash is not null
           else
             staging_object_key is null and final_object_key is null and
             confirmed_mime_type is null and confirmed_byte_size is null and
             width is null and height is null and sha256_hash is null
         end
checks.definition:
check ((case status
           when 'PENDING' then
             staging_object_key is not null and final_object_key is null and
             confirmed_mime_type is null and confirmed_byte_size is null and
             width is null and height is null and sha256_hash is null
           when 'READY' then
             staging_object_key is null and final_object_key is not null and
             confirmed_mime_type is not null and confirmed_byte_size is not null and
             width is not null and height is not null and sha256_hash is not null
           when 'ARCHIVED' then
             staging_object_key is null and final_object_key is not null and
             confirmed_mime_type is not null and confirmed_byte_size is not null and
             width is not null and height is not null and sha256_hash is not null
           else
             staging_object_key is null and final_object_key is null and
             confirmed_mime_type is null and confirmed_byte_size is null and
             width is null and height is null and sha256_hash is null
         end))
